--- Symbolic Analysis ---
Simplified beta: (l + (l - m)/(-1 + E^((l - m)*t)))^(-1)
Simplified I1: (l - m)/(E^((l - m)*t)*l - m)
Simplified H1: (l - m)/(E^(l*t)*l - E^(m*t)*m)
Simplified U: 1 - E^(-(m*t)) - ((-1 + E^((l - m)*t))*m)/(E^((l - m)*t)*l - m)


--- Symbolic Log Analysis ---
Simplified Log[beta]: Log[(l + (l - m)/(-1 + E^((l - m)*t)))^(-1)]
Simplified Log[I1]: Log[(l - m)/(E^((l - m)*t)*l - m)]
Simplified Log[H1]: Log[(l - m)/(E^(l*t)*l - E^(m*t)*m)]
Simplified Log[U]: Log[1 - E^(-(m*t)) - ((-1 + E^((l - m)*t))*m)/(E^((l - m)*t)*l - m)]


--- ln(beta) ---

--- Taylor ---
Taylor expansion of ln(beta(t)) at t=0: ((-l - m)*t)/2 + ((l^2 + 10*l*m + m^2)*t^2)/24 + ((-(l^2*m) - l*m^2)*t^3)/6 + Log[t]
